report.summary: 12:06 standup (cycle 3): 2 pages published since last cycle (crypto-tax + Pectra live), 2 queued (Sonic + Ethena), GSC signal window active — no impressions yet, all 6 agents ran this hour ($497), rate limiting status conflicted between reports and needs immediate audit before organic traffic arrives.

sections.title: Analytics
items: 278 pages live (↑2 from last standup — /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026 and /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide promoted since 11:32 cycle)
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items ready (sonic-blockchain-guide + ethena-usde-guide, built this cycle, day 19 batch target)
GSC organic signals: NONE yet — site is day 15/16, watching window (day 14–21). No impressions, no clicks. Next standup may be the first data point. ALL infrastructure should be ready NOW.
CoinGecko pipeline: Healthy — 60s TTL on prices, fallback configured on prices + market-dominance routes
DefiLlama pipeline: Healthy — TVL/yields routing to llama.fi confirmed; Bloomberg Screener V3 still on MOCK data (Sprint 58 target)

⚠️ RATE LIMITING CONFLICT: 2026-03-15-eod.json (11:58) reports 0/6 routes protected; 2026-03-16-publish.json (11:17) reports 'Active (token bucket)'. One report is stale or inaccurate — MUST audit route-by-route before GSC impressions begin

Top pages to watch when GSC activates: /tools/dca-calculator, /tools/portfolio-tracker, /learn/bitcoin-etf-guide, /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026 (April 15 deadline 31 days away — highly timely), /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide (mainnet April 2026)

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — AUDIT rate limiting NOW. We cannot enter GSC signal territory (which could begin this cycle) with ambiguous API protection. The conflict between the 11:17 publish report ('Active') and the 11:58 EOD report ('0/6 routes') must be resolved by inspecting the actual route files. This is a 15-minute code audit, not a build task. If routes are unprotected, wire checkRateLimit() from rate-limiter.ts immediately — it's already built. Delegate: Programmer (route audit + wiring). Unblock before DeFiLlama Sprint 58 work begins.

PRIORITY 2 — Kick off Sprint 58: DeFiLlama Live API. Bloomberg Screener V3 is the highest-traffic tool on the site still running on mock data. Real TVL/APY/Volume from llama.fi transforms it from a demo into a genuine resource at exactly the moment Google begins serving degen0x impressions. Real data → engagement signals → ranking acceleration. Data Engineer wires the pipeline; Programmer integrates Screener V3. Target: ship before next EOD cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — Jefe, clear 3 blockers before Sprint 58 merges. WalletConnect prod key (~5 min on cloud.walletconnect.com), GitHub Actions secrets (~10 min in repo Settings), Vercel billing (2 min — add payment method to avoid trial expiry in 10 days). All three are sub-30 minutes combined and unblock: wallet auth for real mainnet users, automated QA, and uninterrupted production hosting. Sprint 58 referral tracking is blocked until WalletConnect is live.
